treatment_information.dosage_or_details: IV HydrALAZINE 10 mg, PO/NG HydrALAZINE 25 mg
treatment_information.treatment_response: Blood pressure improved; patient reported resolution of her weakness/numbness.

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: increased dose to 150 mg PO daily

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented with left-sided numbness and weakness.
Patient received IV HydrALAZINE and Labetalol for high blood pressure.
Patient discharged with increased dose of Metoprolol.

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Appointment set to see Dr. ___ for blood pressure management; neurology follow-up recommended.
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: The high blood pressure might have caused the weakness and tingling.
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient felt well and was eager to leave.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient reported feeling better after treatment.
